message:
feat(tests): add 39 property tests for models, error, and migrations

models (12): clamp_thinking_level non-reasoning/reasoning/xhigh,
supports_xhigh specific IDs, canonicalize_openrouter known aliases/
case-insensitive/passthrough, openrouter lookup includes canonical,
merge_headers override/preserve, sap_endpoint reject-empty/format/
strip-trailing-slash.

error (17): AuthDiagnosticCode as_str non-empty/unique, remediation
non-empty, redaction_policy constant, hostcall_error_code known set,
category_code format, context overflow token-based/within-window/
pattern-detection/case-insensitive, retryable empty/overflow-exclusion/
known-patterns/random-rejection, constructor category consistency.

migrations (10): MigrationReport messages empty/providers/session-count/
warning-prefix/deprecation-urls/count-additive, session_cwd_from_header
extraction/wrong-type/empty-file/invalid-json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
